violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloth left on prep counter behind bun toaster on make line. -5 gallon buckets of sani buckets are overfilled so all cloths are not submerged and sanitizer solutions were less than 150ppm Quat. -Sani Bucket with white cloths at drive through was overfilled with cloths and found with a sani solution less than 150ppm Quat.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of condiment packets stored below customer beverage line next to drain lines.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Tea drain line is not directed into floor drain (appears to drain into cabinet) below customer beverage line.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Some dust at walk in cooler and walk in freezer fans. -Floor debris/spill at walk in freezer floor (left side of unit). -Dust build up at ceiling vent in back room.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Mushrooms at 114F and 132F and onions at 109F found in warmer at cook line. *Staff disposed of the mushrooms and onions below 120F and turned unit to higher temperature.--Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -1000 Island portion cups at server/register station found with temp of 54F at top of bin (40F at bottom of bin). *Recommended less/lower stock in pan.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
